title: RFQ - Stainless Steel Mounting Brackets
subject: RFQ: Stainless Steel Mounting Brackets for Generator Skids
body: Hello team, please quote the attached bracket package for our next generator skid batch. We need pricing, lead time and material confirmation by Friday.
description: Standard incoming RFQ with metal part requirements and clear extraction signals.

attachments.content:
# Request for Quotation

RFQ Number: RFQ-2026-118
Document Reference: BRK-118-A
Material: Stainless Steel 304
Requested Quantity: 240 units
Delivery Deadline: 2026-04-18

Please quote laser cut and bent mounting brackets for generator skid assemblies. Include finish, tooling assumptions and packing method.
